data.body: STACK COMMIT 2 (#1 plan-impact fishable-apivorous-redhead): 29d9fa863. decide.impact_plan (MAX+override-floor-LAST+detection; fixed the 0.68<0.70 coherence bug the review flagged) + impact_fn param on pass3_decide/pass3_over_findings (code-review byte-unchanged). verify.plan_review_verification_model via shared _build_binary/_build_verification_output; passes points plan_review_verification at it; both verify prompts emit 7 axes+detection. orchestrator threads impact_fn=impact_plan. tests: test_impact_plan.py (16) + updated test_review_kernel invariant. Pre-commit lint+mypy PASSED; 207 affected tests green.
